Upload Chapter Structure Image
Take a photo or screenshot of your chapter structure (table of contents, textbook index, or outline). Claude will read the image and extract the hierarchy automatically.

Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF — screenshots, photos of textbooks, PDFs printed as images

RTC OPTIONS
Prose
Poetry

Poetry: same stanza, different questions each set
Prose / Drama: different passage each set
Each line = one RTC set. Cognitive levels: Understanding · Application
Difficulty levels: Easy · Medium · Hard
📝 Question Input
Type your requirements directly in the notepads below. Leave a notepad empty to skip generating that type (treated as 0).
Your text is passed directly to the AI — describe counts, difficulty, topics, or any instructions you need.
🎯 Objective Questions (SCQ + RA)
Leave empty to skip Objective generation (count = 0).
✍️ Subjective Questions (VSA / SA / LA)
Leave empty to skip Subjective generation (count = 0).
⚖️ Reason-Assertion Descriptive (RAD)
Leave empty to skip RAD generation (count = 0). Supported for Math, Chemistry, Physics, Social CBSE and Biology ICSE.
Please fill all required fields.
